message:
Add Series dt month_name/day_name conformance coverage

Add conformance fixtures and harness support for:
- series_dt_month_name: Get full month name (January, February, etc.)
- series_dt_day_name: Get full day name (Monday, Tuesday, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     #[serde(rename = "series_dt_round", alias = "series_dt_round_default")]
     SeriesDtRound,
+    #[serde(rename = "series_dt_month_name", alias = "series_dt_month_name_default")]
+    SeriesDtMonthName,
+    #[serde(rename = "series_dt_day_name", alias = "series_dt_day_name_default")]
